title: 医药英语
description: ✬ Hello, everyone! Welcome to Pharmaceutical English! In this course we will explore the history of medicine, pharmaceutical science, pharmaceutical professions, and drug management. Join us to discover how the course works, and we hope you enjoy a pleasant and rewarding learning experience.

instructors.name: 张秋月;罗锦霞;胡良玉;崔成红;姚融乐;邓舒;熊存全;李正亚;季月华;胡晓寒;刘春妹;潘岚岚
